name: GroupCreate
description: Create a new Weibo follow group

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const dryrun = {{ dryrun }} || false; const name = '{{ name }}'; return { dryrun, name }; }

argument.target: 自定义分组旁边的管理按钮

selectors.reason: Uses stable semantic classes directly on the target button element.
Identifies the button by its stable class and the presence of its specific child span element.
Scopes the button within its main panel container for better specificity.
Uses semantic classes 'woo-button-main' and 'woo-button-primary' which are likely stable and specific to the primary action button.
Anchors the button within the stable modal container 'woo-modal-main' to ensure uniqueness.
Uses the style class 'woo-button-line' combined with the base class to identify the button.

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const dryrun = intermediate.dryrun; const name = intermediate.name; if (dryrun) return [{ status: 'dryrun', message: 'Dryrun mode - title filled but not submitted', name }]; const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]'); for (const btn of buttons) { const t = (btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '').trim(); if (t === '确定') { btn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Group created', name }]; } } return [{ status: 'error', message: 'Could not find confirm button', name }]; }
